# Add description for Dub Techno genre

**Labels:** good first issue, genre, data

## Description

The Dub Techno genre entry in our taxonomy is missing a description. We need a concise 2-3 sentence description covering:

- What defines the sound (long reverb tails, chord washes, minimal percussion)
- Key origins (Basic Channel, Chain Reaction label, Berlin ~1993)
- How it relates to neighbors (bridge between Techno Massif and Ambient Depths)

## How to contribute

1. Edit `docs/electronic-music-taxonomy.json`
2. Add a `description` field to the Dub Techno entry
3. Cite your sources (Ishkur, RA, Wikipedia)

## References
- [Ishkur's Guide — Dub Techno](https://music.ishkur.com/)
- [RA — Basic Channel](https://ra.co/labels/basicchannel)
